raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Joakas bija diuidermits
nn trihs Gaddus wezz / kad
wiꞥſch par Kehniau tappe/ un
waldija trihs Meneschus Jeru-
saleme. Un winna Mahteibija
Amutala Wahrda/ Jereimijafa
Meita no Libnas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas
tam KUNGA M ne patikke/ itt
tà patt ka winna Tehwi bij
darrijſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Warauß Nekus zee-
tinaja to Riblata eekſch tahs
Semmes Eemata / ka tam Je-
rusaleme ne bij waldiht/un wiꞥſch
uslikke tai Semmê Meſlus doht/
fints Talentus Sudraba / un
weenu Talentu Selta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Warauß Nekus dar-
rija Elijakimu Josijus Dehlu par
Kehniau winna Tehwa Josijus
Weetâ / un dewe winnam zittu
Wahrdu (un fauze to ) Joa-
kin. Bet Joakafu nehme wiꞥſch
lihds/ un nahze us Egipti/ un
nomirre tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jojakims dewe Wara-
um to Sudrabu un Seltu. Bet
wiꞥſch nehme Meſlus no tahs
Semmes/ ka tas to Sudrabu
pehz Warauß Pawehleschann
dohtu/ iſkatru meſloja wiꞥſch
pehz winna Padohnui to Su-
drabu un Seltu doht/starp tahs
Semmes Laudim / ko tam bij
Warauu Nekum doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jojakims bija diuideſ-
mits un peezus Gaddus wezz/
kad wiꞥſch par Kehniau tappe/
un waldija weenpa defimits Gad-
dus Jerusaletne. Un winna
Mahteibija Sebuda Wahrdal
Pedajus Meita no Rumas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas
tam KUNGA M ne patikke /
pehz wiſsu/ ko winna Tehwi bij
darrijſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Inna Laikâ zehlahs
Nebudkadnezars tas
Babeles Kehniſch us
augſchu / un Jojakims tappe
winnam trihs Gaddus par Kal-
pu/ pehz nowehrſahs wiꞥſch/ un
atkahpe no niana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KURGS fuhtija
prett winnu to Kaldeëru Pulkus/
un to Sihreçu Pulkus/ un to
Moabiteru Pulkus/ un to Am-
moniteru Behrnu Pulkus/ un
fuhtija tohs prett Juhdu winnu
nomaitaht / pehz ta KUNGA
Wahrdu/ ko wiꞥſch bij runnajes
zaur ſaweem Kalpeem teem Pra-
weefcheem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teetcham pehz ta KUNga
Wahrda tas Juhdam ta notik-
ke/ ka wiꞥſch tohs no tewis at-
mesu Manaffus Grehku deht/
ko wiꞥſch bij darrijs.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
